description: This Java class 'JwtAuthFilter' extends Spring Security's OncePerRequestFilter to parse incoming Bearer JWT tokens from HTTP requests, validate them using JwtService, and set the authentication context accordingly.

classes.name: JwtAuthFilter
classes.description: A Spring Security filter that processes JWT tokens from Authorization headers and manages authentication context.

methods.name: doFilterInternal
methods.description: Overrides the Spring filter method to extract JWT, validate it, and set authentication in the security context.
